'''Tozeer''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tozeer system/Legends|Tozeer system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Atlas" /> Tozeer was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] world with [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] and [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] living on it.<ref name="Yoda" />

While on an undercover mission on Tozeer after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] was captured and dismantled by Tuskens. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] found his head and recovered the other pieces from Jawas known as "the Brothers." In exchange, Luke protected the Brothers' sandcrawler from the Tuskens.<ref name="Yoda" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Yoda Stories]]'' {{1st}}
